ORDER APPROVING SALE OF REAL PROPERTY

MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON JUL-28-2005 IN 206, REFEREE LOIS BRADY'S MOTION TO CONFIRM SALE PURSUANT TO CCP 873.720 WAS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. NO OVERBID. TOP BID: $1,317,000.00. APPROVED 6% COMMISSION. REFEREE'S FEES $6,000.00. ORDER SIGNED. HON. ROBERT L. DONDERO; CLERKS: V. MU/D. LOK; REPORTER: JOANN BRYCE, CSR #3321 (206)

DISCOVERY 610, NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: NO OPPOSITION HAVING BEEN FILED, PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR AN ORDER TO DEEM CERTAIN MATTERS ADMITTED IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT IS ORDERED TO PROVIDE COMPLETE RESPONSES WITHOUT OBJECTION TO THE INTERROGATORIES WITHIN 14 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. FAILURE TO RESPOND WAS A MISUSE OF THE DISCOVERY PROCESS. SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED IN THE AMOUNT OF $655.10, TO BE PAID WITHIN 14 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. BRUCE E. CHAN.

MASTER SHORT CAUSE CALENDAR SET FOR MAY-02-2005 VACATED. PLAINTIFF COUNSEL CHARLES N. BENDES INDICATED THAT HE HAD STIPULATION TO ORDER FOR PARTITION SALE OF REAL PROPERTY, APPOINTMENT OF REFEREE, INTERLOCUTORY JUDGMENT OF PARTITION WHICH WAS FILED. ALSO ORDER FOR PARTITION SALE OF REAL PROPERTY AND APPOINTMENT OF REFEREE, INTERLOCUTORY JUDGMENT OF PARTITION PURSUANT TO STIPULATION WAS FILED AND SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. COUNSEL TO CONTACT THIS DEPARTMENT REGARDING THE REMAINING ISSUE OF THE CONFIRMATION OF SALE OF REAL PROPERTY. HON. ROBERT L. DONDERO; CLERKS: V. MU/D. OKAZAKI; REPORTER: JOANN BRYCE, #3321 (206)
